events.name: Vacation Bible School- Illumination
events.description: ArborKids is so excited to bring you this year's Vacation Bible School, "Illumination". Open to children ages 4 (and fully potty trained) through 5th grade. We're so looking forward to shining a light on who Jesus really is through stories, songs, crafts, and games! What an incredible way to kick off summer break. Registration is $40 per child and $25 for each additional sibling. Scholarships and discounts are available, please email lindsey@arborchurch.com to inquire.
